meta.title: About — Vela
meta.description: We believe the ancient wisdom of the cosmos and daily introspection belong together.

hero.p: Vela was born from a simple belief — that the ancient wisdom of the cosmos and the intimacy of daily journalling belong together. We're a small team of designers, engineers, and astrology practitioners who believe introspection is a practice, not a moment.

mission.p1: Most of us rush through our days without pausing to notice how we feel, what we need, or where we're headed. Vela is the quiet corner you return to — where the planets overhead and the words in your heart meet.
mission.p2: We combine astrological intelligence with empathetic AI to offer something rare: a companion that knows both the sky and your soul.

stats.aware: Users report feeling more self-aware after 30 days

values.p: Three ideas shape everything we build.

depth.p: We refuse to gamify introspection. Every feature exists to slow you down, not speed you up — to help you go deeper into what actually matters to you.

privacy.p: Your journal is yours. We never sell your data, never train on your words without permission, and never use your vulnerabilities to serve ads. Full stop.

ancient.p: We take astrology seriously without being dogmatic. The stars are a language — one that millions have used for centuries to find pattern and meaning in chaos.

team.p: A quiet group of builders, dreamers, and practitioners. We work remotely across four time zones and meet under the same sky.

sofia.bio: Former product lead at Headspace. Scorpio rising, obsessive about ritual design and quiet UX.

marcus.bio: Previously at DeepMind. Built the AI layer that makes Vela's journalling feel like it actually listens.

rania.bio: Certified astrologer with 14 years of practice. She ensures our star data is as poetic as it is accurate.

lena.bio: Crafts every pixel with the patience of a Virgo. Previously at Figma. Believes good design is invisible.

jonas.bio: Data-driven but soul-first. Grew our community from 0 to 1.2 million through word of mouth and patience.

aisha.bio: The warmth behind every reply. Gemini sun, deeply committed to making every user feel truly heard.

story.p1: Vela started as a side project — a personal journalling tool Sofia built for herself during a difficult year. She shared it with ten friends. Then a hundred. Then it became something none of us could have predicted.
story.p2: We've stayed small on purpose. Growth for us means depth, not scale.

t2022.title: First prototype
t2022.desc: Sofia and Marcus build a rough journalling app with basic birth chart data in a San Francisco apartment.

t2023early.title: Beta launch & first 10,000 users
t2023early.desc: Shared quietly on Reddit and Substack. Zero paid marketing. The community grew entirely through word of mouth.

t2023late.title: AI journalling companion
t2023late.desc: Launched the empathetic AI layer — the feature that makes Vela feel like a friend who knows both you and the sky.

t2024.title: 1 million seekers
t2024.desc: Reached one million monthly active users and expanded the team from 3 to 12 people, all fully remote.

today.title: Still just beginning
today.desc: New features in birth chart readings, weekly rhythms, and community reflection — all coming quietly, when the timing is right.
